rationale: Section 19.007 governs state funding for a state-operated district from the foundation school fund. It does not reference homestead exemptions, property tax appraised values, or Tax Code §11.13. The proposed change affects local property tax revenue, not the operative funding mechanism here.
quote: The costs for persons eligible under Section 19.005 shall be paid from the foundation school fund.
_note: No direct conflict. The statute addresses state-borne operating costs for a specific district; homestead exemption changes do not alter its operative provisions. Any fiscal impact on the foundation school fund would be indirect and handled through separate school finance formulas.
